meaning: adj.涓嶆樉钁楃殑,涓嶆槑鏄剧殑
examples: Inapparent or subclinical infections occur when too few cells are infected to cause clinical symptoms.
For rivers with lower concentration of suspended sediment, effect of concentration on settling velocity is inapparent.
Compared with ATP-activated current, the NPA-activated current was of smaller amplitude and showed inapparent desensitization.
